description: Unified default acceptance standards for futures expression factors. Fast IC screens are prefilters only; final acceptance requires scorecard gates plus model-incremental validation.

windows.oos_policy: OOS metrics are report evidence and should not be repeatedly tuned.

trading.cost_policy: A-grade factors must pass the turnover proxy; B/C model features can survive if incremental model evidence is strong.

incremental.high_corr_escape_rule: A high-correlation candidate can be retained only when residualized IC remains above threshold or model-incremental tests pass.

robustness.ridge_validation: Exact leave-one-factor-out retrain; retain if removing the factor lowers validation-month pred_xsz IC.
robustness.lightgbm_validation: Single-factor standard-normal replacement; retain if replacement lowers validation-month pred_xsz IC.

final_artifact_rule.model_effective_sets: Report Ridge-retained, LightGBM-retained, and intersection subsets separately; do not assume every scorecard-passed factor is model-effective.

decision.A: Passes data quality, IC, bucket, regime, trading, incremental, and robustness gates.
decision.B: Passes data quality, IC, incremental, and robustness gates, with either bucket or regime support; suitable as a model feature.
decision.C: Passes data quality, IC, and incremental gates but is conditional by product/regime.
decision.D: Watchlist; has partial signal but fails an important gate.
decision.E: Discard; fails data quality, IC, leakage, or incremental value.
